$schema_comment: Operator preferences for Co-work / run_db_first. Not consumed by GitHub Actions.

research_cadence.description: When Track A (generic research) is expected to run. Project-level; may run more often than portfolio tasks.
research_cadence.anchor_note: baseline_date in each research_delta targets the latest Sunday (or last baseline) on or before run date; full-scope anchor aligns with weekly baseline digest.
research_cadence.notes: Not consumed by GitHub Actions. One recurring Cowork job can use cowork/tasks/recurring-scheduled-run.md; or split schedules across research-daily-delta.md / research-weekly-baseline.md / research-monthly-synthesis.md / portfolio-pm-rebalance.md.

execution_assumption.notes: market_close aligns with evening price_history refresh; market_open may require backfill_execution_prices.py.

rebalance_source_for_opens.notes: prior_trading_day → execute_at_open.py --prior-trading-day-rebalance (e.g. Fri decision → Mon open).

cowork_operator.description: Filled by the Cowork setup wizard (cowork/SETUP-ATLAS-COWORK.md). Not read by Python scripts.
cowork_operator.cadence_summary: Two separate weekday pre-market tasks: research delta at 6:00 AM ET (10:00 UTC), positioning/PM at 8:00 AM ET (12:00 UTC). Both finish before US equity open at 9:30 AM ET.
cowork_operator.month_end_policy: Last US equity session of calendar month — swap research-daily-delta.md for research-monthly-synthesis.md that day. Sunday runs use research-weekly-baseline.md instead of research-daily-delta.md.

scheduled_tasks.name: Atlas — Research Delta (pre-market)
scheduled_tasks.notes: Sunday: swap task file to research-weekly-baseline.md (cron: 0 10 * * 0). Month-end: swap to research-monthly-synthesis.md.

scheduled_tasks.name: Atlas — Positioning / PM Rebalance (pre-market)
scheduled_tasks.notes: Requires research-daily-delta task to have published digest first. 90-min window before 9:30 AM ET open.

cowork_operator.notes: EDT offset (UTC-4) applies Apr–Oct; EST (UTC-5) Nov–Mar. UTC crons stay fixed — effective ET times shift by 1h in winter but remain safely pre-open.
